mapper.select: SELECT sc.*, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, c.class_name, sub.subject_name FROM score_info sc LEFT JOIN student_info s ON sc.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN subject sub ON sc.subject_id = sub.id WHERE sc.id = #{id}

SELECT sc.*, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, c.class_name, sub.subject_name FROM score_info sc LEFT JOIN student_info s ON sc.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN subject sub ON sc.subject_id = sub.id ORDER BY sc.create_time DESC

SELECT sc.*, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, c.class_name, sub.subject_name FROM score_info sc LEFT JOIN student_info s ON sc.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN subject sub ON sc.subject_id = sub.id WHERE sc.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY sc.exam_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO score_info (student_id, subject_id, score, exam_date, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{subjectId}, #{score}, #{examDate}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE score_info SET student_id = #{studentId}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, score = #{score}, exam_date = #{examDate}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE score_info SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO score_info (student_id, subject_id, score, exam_date, status) VALUES
(#{item.studentId}, #{item.subjectId}, #{item.score}, #{item.examDate}, #{item.status})
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(score) FROM score_info WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 1
